about.resumeDescription: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from the Federal University of Espírito Santo, with a strong foundation in software development, design patterns, and artificial intelligence. Proactive and highly motivated to learn new tools and methodologies, with experience thriving in collaborative and challenging environments. Skilled at applying analytical thinking and creativity to develop efficient and scalable solutions.
about.technologiesDescription: Strong technical background in Java, Spring Boot, PL/SQL, and Python, with a growing interest in Artificial Intelligence and Cybersecurity.

experience.description: Backend developer working on implementation and maintenance of the ERP System Conexos. Responsible for the development of new functionalities, troubleshooting and system performance improvements. Using Java, Spring Boot and Oracle

I developed and maintained reports in the Related ERP System. Contributed to data visualization improvements, bug fixes, and in improving reporting performance by improving queries. Using Oracle PL/SQL and JasperReports.
